raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative self-affirmation enacting identity revision through declarative speech acts",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "identity is modifiable in real time via linguistic/cognitive operations",
    "current roles can be accurately identified as obsolete and voluntarily discarded",
    "self-acceptance and ongoing change are simultaneously sustainable",
    "future self-states can be experientially instantiated in the present without temporal contradiction"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a constructivist-metaphorical frame; metaphors of coding and temporal compression cohere but rest on non-literal mappings",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "user maintains reality-testing, statement aligns with therapeutic goals, and repetition supports adaptive behavioral change rather than substitution for action",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "user treats metaphors as literal mechanisms, uses statement to bypass grief or accountability, or confuses aspirational language with achieved transformation"
}
